description: Babytown Mini Waffle Fleece Blanket Presenting Baby town's fleece comforter, a delightful blanket that introduces your baby to different textures. The fluffy soft material is a great way for them to explore their fingertips whilst snuggled up. Made from a 100% Polyester this material allows you to benefit from fabric properties such as; Fabulously Fluffy - Soft to the touch against your newborn delicate skin Easy To Care For - Designed to endure repeat washing, retaining its size and softness Water Resistant - The polyester offers a certain degree of water resistance High Quality - The double stitched seams assure a durable / long lasting blanket Available in a generous size - 75cm x 90cm. This would be keeping the little ones warm and cosy in their cot, pram, buggy, car seats, moses baskets or crib! This would also make a great gift idea for Birthdays, Christmas, Nappy Cakes, Baby Showers or Christenings! Limited stock availability, act now and get yours today! If you have any questions about this product then please don't hesitate to get in contact, our office hours are 9-5:30 and we try to reply within 24 hours
